steps.description: Click inside the "Message Copilot" text input box in the chat interface of the M365 Copilot web application to focus the cursor and enable message typing.

parameters.text: show repair records assigned to karin blair

steps.description: Type "show repair records assigned to karin blair" into the main chat input box at the bottom of the agent interface in the M365 Copilot web application.
Click the "Send" button (blue circle with red, white, and blue flag icon) to submit the message "show repair records assigned to karin blair" in the chat input of the M365 Copilot web app.
Click the "Always allow" button in the permission prompt within the M365 Copilot web chat interface.
@assertion get ai send back message include "Oil Change"
